name: agent-routing-kit
description: Deterministic routing and context-budget helpers for agentic development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Route tasks and keep context budgets visible.
interface.longDescription: Agent Routing Kit provides a small public-safe Codex skill for deterministic task routing, context-budget checks, and clean extraction handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Route this task, identify public-safe utility boundaries, and keep the handoff concise.
